text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Time to raise the roof, up and up!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: We'll hit 'em with a whahey and a woo!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You both seem excited. Something happen?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Have I got a story for you! No choice
but to shake it off!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You got that right, sis! And all us peeps are here
to party with ya!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: All right, let's calm down. Is it something good?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Find out by coming to the faculty room with us! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well I kinda blanked on doing aaall my
homework. Five subjects worth of teachers are on
my case now! Isn't that crazy?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
That's like five different parties to go to! You're
settin' a world record for sure!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh. All right, I'll tag along. Just make sure to properly apologize.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ooogh... Appreciate you two for real.
